_note: renderToHTMLOrFlight is exported from app-render.tsx, imported into module.ts which calls it directly in AppPageRouteModule.render() and re-exports it. module.render.ts wraps it via dynamic require as lazyRenderAppPage. lazyRenderAppPage is then called from next-server.ts and export/routes/app-page.ts. Verified via grep -rn across packages/next/src/.
